profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for curated external API listings.

service.name: StableSocial
service.tagline: Pay-per-request social media data for agents.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableSocial APIs covering social media retrieval and analysis workflows. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableSocial.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableSocial docs and social-data workflows for agents.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
Authenticate directly with StableSocial as required by the provider.
